meaning: n.阿尔泰语(苏联境内一语言),阿尔泰山
examples: On the Altai the antler deer breeding has become widespread.
The picture was taken in the Altai territory of Russia, right in the border regions of Kazakhstan.
The Scythian Pazyryk of the Altai Mountain region were another ancient culture which employed tattoos.
The non-Caucasian Federal subjects in the bottom dozen are Tuva and Altai (in Siberia).
He encounters a Karelian witch, a Siberian shaman and wild horses in the Altai mountains.
